title: Finding Oasis in Manchester
description: Manchester is where music and machines collide. From Oasis's roots to the birthplace of modern computing, this city punches well above its weight.
coverAlt: Blue heritage plaque on a red brick wall in Manchester commemorating a historic music venue

images.alt: Blue heritage plaque mounted on a weathered red brick wall in Manchester
images.caption: The spot where Oasis had their first gig.

images.alt: Tall rack of early computing hardware with rows of valves, switches, and wiring at the Science and Industry Museum
images.caption: The world's first stored-program computer — it's super impressive to see the scale of the machine and the engineering behind it.

images.alt: Victorian-era Jacquard loom mechanism with stacks of orange and grey punched cards feeding through the frame
images.caption: The "code" in the 19th century was punched cards.
